title: Kapa Bead Clean Up
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a post-amplification 1X Purification using AMPure Beads. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
steps_raw: This protocol performs a post-amplification 1X Purification using AMPure Beads. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
Add 90ul (50ul sample in there), Mix at 110ul, 7-10x
Remove 140ul supernatant into waste. Go down again.
200ul ethanol washes x2. Use one set of tips to add ethanol from top of the well.
Resuspend beads with eb, mix 20 times, aspirate low dispense high, default flow rate.
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
